base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of equipment_items — a pickup_item from 1997 castlevania symphony of night. ~200 equipment items — weapons (swords/whips/maces/fists)/armor/shields/accessories + consumables + sub-weapons. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
